narrative_presets.label: Protestant Removal
narrative_presets.query: protestant unionist presbyterian orange landlord exodus minority loyalist non-catholic
narrative_presets.thesis: Trace claims of Protestant displacement, unionist anxiety, and minority vulnerability inside the revolutionary period.

narrative_presets.label: Non-Homogeneous Ireland
narrative_presets.query: minority mixed non-catholic protestant presbyterian unionist loyalist belfast labour parish
narrative_presets.thesis: Surface evidence that Ireland was socially, confessionally, and politically mixed rather than homogeneous.

narrative_presets.label: Civic Friction
narrative_presets.query: boycott intimidation police ric magistrate loyalist landlord clergy
narrative_presets.thesis: Map conflict between civic administration, loyalist institutions, local coercion, and revolutionary rhetoric.

claim_presets.label: Replacement Pressure
claim_presets.query: volunteer gaelic patriotic movement duty nation labour protestant unionist minority
claim_presets.counter_query: protestant presbyterian minority labour civic municipal foreign travel commerce
claim_presets.thesis: Track whether plurality and civic language are displaced by a more disciplined nationalist editorial vocabulary.

claim_presets.label: Plurality Decay
claim_presets.query: protestant presbyterian minority church of ireland mixed civic labour
claim_presets.counter_query: volunteer patriotic gaelic discipline sacrifice nation
claim_presets.thesis: Measure the decline of confessional and civic plurality inside the press slice of the archive.

claim_presets.label: Nationalist Emergence
claim_presets.query: volunteer movement patriotic nation gaelic duty sacrifice republican
claim_presets.counter_query: foreign travel commerce workers minority plural civic
claim_presets.thesis: Surface the years and documents where nationalist discipline becomes a strong semantic organizing force.
